name: Magical Pokaan
original_name: 錬金3級 まじかる?ぽか〜ん
overview: The energetic werewolf Liru, the joyful witch-in-training Uma, the motherly android Aiko, and the seductive vampire Pachira—are princesses from the netherworld who have traveled to the human world in search of a new home.

trailers.title: Renkin San-kyuu Magical Pokaan (鮮血の誓い) - Creditless Opening
